title: brachypodium schimperi
intro: Brachypodium schimperi, also known as the Ethiopian false brome, is a species of grass native to the Horn of Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to help treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Brachypodium schimperi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Brachypodium schimperi is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
